overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from a vessel's bridge at night during a storm. The vessel navigates through a harbor approach with navigation displays visible overhead, passing by industrial dock structures while lightning flashes illuminate the scene briefly.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open harbor approach

events.description: bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the entire scene through the bridge windows

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel through harbor approach while executing a starboard turn as indicated on the radar display

entered.detail: three-screen navigation console showing chart, radar, and depth/speed data
bow of the vessel visible through the bridge windows with deck railings
dark water surface illuminated by the vessel's forward lights

segments.scene_description: From the ship's bridge, the vessel navigates through dark harbor waters at night. The three navigation displays show chart data, radar with a turning course, and depth information. At approximately 4 seconds, a bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the stormy conditions outside as the vessel continues its starboard turn toward the dock area.

events.description: industrial dock structures with containers and cranes come into view on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: navigating alongside the harbor dock infrastructure, maintaining course in the channel

entered.detail: industrial dock with stacked containers and loading equipment visible on the starboard side

segments.scene_description: The vessel proceeds along the harbor channel with industrial dock structures now prominent on the right side. The navigation displays remain active as the ship passes the dock area, with the container terminal moving from mid-distance to close proximity and then receding as the vessel continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy harbor toward an industrial dock area. It begins with the vessel executing a starboard turn through dark waters, while overhead navigation displays track chart data, radar, and depth. As the ship maneuvers, a sudden, bright flash of lightning momentarily illuminates the surrounding storm before the vessel aligns with the harbor channel. The scene then shifts as the camera passes a container terminal, with the industrial dock structures moving from the mid-distance into close proximity on the right. Finally, the vessel continues forward, leaving the terminal behind as the industrial landscape recedes into the night.
